subcodes.first_line: We send greetings to Jinab-i-Nazir. We beseech God to unite what hath been scattered and to bestow upon him His goodly favors [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب ناظر را سلام میرسانیم نسئل الله بان یجمع ما تفرق منه و یرزقه الخیر فی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
